title: PB-155 VERIFIED: Resolve checkout v6 governance test drift
scope: Resolve policy/test mismatch after approval of actions/checkout@v6.

exact_failure.message: unterminated string literal caused by malformed checkout version fixture text

root_cause.primary: Governance policy drift after checkout@v6 approval was reflected inconsistently across policy, workflows, and test fixture text.
root_cause.policy_drift: approved_github_actions_policy.json still declared actions/checkout allowed_version v4 while workflow/test drift introduced checkout@v6.
root_cause.test_drift: Dependabot workflow version bump fixture contained an invalid multiline string and modeled an obsolete v4/v6 transition.
root_cause.validation_impact: Full pytest collection stopped before assertions in tests/test_governed_dependabot_pr_automation.py.

fail_closed_position: The stale full-suite run is treated as incomplete evidence. Only isolated named tests are trusted for PB-155 blocker resolution.
